title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 2–5, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter how great of a man he may have been in the past,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He's just another cook that I can easily kill at gunpoint now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why that bastard! He broke owner Zeff's pegleg!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: son of a...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sir!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's it, I'm gonna send him flying!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Wait. Let's see what he has to say first.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You want to save this man, don't you Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then leave this ship!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: Thank God...! Who knows what would've happened if Pearl continued his rampage!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Looks like he's been put down for. Now.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Leave this ship?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As if!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: S-Sanji you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't provoke him anymore or owner Zeff'll be...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: old man, you're pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's the kind of example you set when the other cooks are trying to fight!?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Hmph. I don't need to hear that from a little eggplant like you.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Who you calling a little eggplant, you damn geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can't treat me as a kid forever!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: sanji, you idiot! Now's not the time for this!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: you're not trying to get owner Zeff killed now, are ya!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
